uses-fenced-code-blocks-for-command.description: Uses fenced code blocks for command examples, schemas, or prompt templates.

uses-markdown-tables-for-compact-command.description: Uses markdown tables for compact command, file, or option matrices.

documentation-pattern-h1-title-short-int.description: Documentation pattern: H1 title, short introduction, then operational sections with headings, tables, examples, or path references for future maintainers.

uses-explicit-non-negotiable-language-to.description: Uses explicit NON-NEGOTIABLE language to encode hard behavioral constraints for agents.

command-spec-pattern-title-names-the.description: Command-spec pattern: title names the bang command, followed by syntax, phase/step procedures, required dashboard/project reads, and final reporting expectations.

functional-react-component-with-hooks-fo.description: Functional React component with hooks for local state/effects and Electron API calls isolated behind window.electronAPI.

page-directory-organization-separates-hi.description: Page-directory organization separates high-level page shells from nested component, style, and index modules.

protocol-module-pattern-focused-markdown.description: Protocol-module pattern: focused markdown files decompose master/worker behavior into reusable instructions referenced by command files and skills.

p-track-era-planning-pattern-plan.description: p_track-era planning pattern: plan.json carries shared context and task entries before initialization.json/progress files handle dashboard rendering and lifecycle state.

profile-pattern-role-priorities-constrai.description: Profile pattern: role, priorities, constraints, output style, and success criteria define a task-scoped agent persona modifier.

control-plane-documentation-pattern-mark.description: Control-plane documentation pattern: markdown is treated as operational configuration for agents, not just explanatory prose.

skill-definition-pattern-trigger-guidanc.description: Skill-definition pattern: trigger guidance first, then workflow steps and referenced protocol files; these files are loaded on demand by Claude Code.

modal-components-compose-the-shared-moda.description: Modal components compose the shared Modal shell and close via an onClose callback from App-level modal routing.

action-buttons-sized-22x22-slightly-smal.description: Action buttons sized 22x22 (slightly smaller than nav buttons elsewhere — IDE compactness convention).

active-state-applied-via-sidebar-tab.description: Active state applied via .sidebar-tab.active conditional class.

affecteditems-list-rendered-as-a-scrolla.description: AffectedItems list rendered as a scrollable code-style list (git-manager-dialog-affected) — keeps long file lists readable.

boolean-isedit-derived-from-edittask-dri.description: Boolean isEdit derived from !!editTask drives initial state values.

buttons-follow-naming-convention-modal-b.description: Buttons follow naming convention .modal-btn + variant suffix (.modal-btn-cancel, .modal-btn-confirm, .modal-btn-close).

collapsible-section-pattern-with-header-.description: Collapsible section pattern with header acting as toggle.

companion-to-errormodal-both-are-minimal.description: Companion to ErrorModal — both are minimal wrappers over Modal with stylized actions.

conditional-render-of-expanded-panel-as.description: Conditional render of expanded panel as sibling of FAB inside a single .queue-popup-container.

conditional-ui-new-wave-option-in.description: Conditional UI: '+ New Wave' option in select toggles a follow-up name input field — common pattern for inline-creation in dropdowns.

css-custom-properties-for-theme-variable.description: CSS custom properties for theme variables inside injected styles — avoids hardcoded colors scattered across selectors.

custom-thin-scrollbar-via-scrollbar-widt.description: Custom thin scrollbar via scrollbar-width:thin + scrollbar-color combo.

data-level-attribute-on-filter-buttons.description: data-level attribute on filter buttons enables CSS to color buttons per level (vs inline style).

empty-state-flex-center-with-min.description: Empty state: flex center with min-height:60px and muted icon.

empty-state-stub-pattern-render-a.description: Empty-state stub pattern: render a low-opacity SVG icon plus heading + subtext, used uniformly across Synapse for placeholder views.

every-other-modal-in-this-directory.description: Every other modal in this directory wraps its body in <Modal title=... onClose=... className=...> rather than reimplementing overlay/ESC/header logic — single source of truth for keyboard and click-out behavior.

fileresult-relativepath-optional-falls-b.description: fileResult.relativePath optional — falls back to fileResult.file when missing.

focus-visible-outline-offset-2px-to.description: Focus-visible outline-offset: -2px to inset focus ring.

handlechunkref-current-handlechunk-patte.description: handleChunkRef.current = handleChunk pattern — workaround for IPC listener closure capturing stale state.

header-comment-mirrors-historymodal-js-j.description: Header comment 'Mirrors HistoryModal.js' — JSX-converted from older vanilla.

heavy-use-of-var-token-fallback.description: Heavy use of var(--token, fallback) pattern for graceful degradation.

iife-with-strict-mode-and-idempotent.description: IIFE with strict mode and idempotent guard — required for any executeJavaScript-injected script.

inline-mark-for-highlighting-picks-up.description: Inline <mark> for highlighting — picks up CSS via .ide-search-match-highlight class.

inline-match-highlights-via-styled-span.description: Inline match highlights via styled <span> wrappers in result text.

loading-bar-absolutely-positioned-within.description: Loading bar absolutely positioned within URL form with translateX keyframe animation.

mix-of-theme-variables-and-hard.description: Mix of theme variables and hard-coded VS Code dark palette.

modals-that-need-fixed-action-buttons.description: Modals that need fixed action buttons at the bottom use the `footer` prop (e.g. ProjectModal); modals with inline buttons in the body do not (e.g. ConfirmModal, ErrorModal, TaskEditorModal).

monospace-font-stack-cascadia-code-fira.description: Monospace font stack 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas' for REPL feel.

multi-scope-sidebar-with-collapsible-fol.description: Multi-scope sidebar with collapsible folders and per-folder Add (+) buttons — same expand/collapse pattern as IDE FileExplorer but lighter weight.

mutationobserver-debounced-scan-the-cano.description: MutationObserver + debounced scan — the canonical SPA-aware DOM-watching pattern.

pinned-right-buttons-via-margin-left.description: Pinned-right buttons via margin-left:auto inside flex row.

plain-css-stylesheet-imported-by-rendere.description: Plain CSS stylesheet imported by renderer modules; styling relies on shared class names rather than CSS modules.

poll-only-when-expanded-closes-interval.description: POLL only when expanded — closes interval in cleanup so collapsed panels don't burn requests.

postmessage-with-structured-type-field-h.description: postMessage with structured type field — host filters by message.data.type === 'synapse-edit'.

prevlengthref-pattern-vs-length-as-state.description: prevLengthRef pattern (vs length-as-state) prevents render-cycle dependency on prev length.

promise-all-loads-history-analytics-in.description: Promise.all loads history + analytics in parallel.

pure-presentational-computes-color-strin.description: Pure presentational; computes color string inline from a ternary.

same-minimal-wrapping-pattern-as-confirm.description: Same minimal wrapping pattern as ConfirmModal — Modal + message paragraph + .modal-actions row.

section-banner-navigation-each-section-s.description: Section banner navigation: each section starts with /* ============ Title ============ */ banner.

single-component-handles-two-distinct-mo.description: Single component handles two distinct modes via a boolean prop — simpler than two separate components but increases prop API surface.

single-pass-count-aggregation-in-usememo.description: Single-pass count aggregation in useMemo to avoid filtering N times for N levels.

smart-auto-scroll-guard-el-scrollheight.description: Smart auto-scroll guard: `el.scrollHeight - el.scrollTop - el.clientHeight < 40` — same idiom used in ClaudeView (with 80px threshold).

stateless-presentational-component-recei.description: Stateless presentational component — receives all data via props.

stoppropagation-on-fab-click-prevents-th.description: stopPropagation on FAB click prevents the document listener from immediately collapsing the panel.

stream-json-event-router-processevent-sw.description: Stream-JSON event router (processEvent switch) with provider parity (Claude SDK + Codex stream-json) — same parsing strategy used in PlanningModal.extractJSON.

tab-top-accent-via-pseudo-element.description: Tab top-accent via pseudo-element rather than border-top to avoid layout shift.

three-sub-components-analyticssection-to.description: Three sub-components: AnalyticsSection (top), HistoryEntry (per row) — keeps render concerns separated.

three-tier-danger-level-system-with.description: Three-tier danger level system with consistent icon + button class mapping — used by QuickActions for all destructive flows.

tool-call-tool-result-correlation-via.description: Tool call + tool result correlation via id-to-index map — enables collapsed result expansion without parent re-render.

toolbar-uses-min-height-height-flex.description: Toolbar uses min-height + height + flex-shrink:0 to lock its size.

two-step-double-confirm-step-1.description: Two-step double-confirm: step 1 is just acknowledge, step 2 has the type-to-confirm input — the actual onConfirm only fires from step 2.

uppercase-0-06em-letter-spaced-section.description: Uppercase 0.06em letter-spaced section titles consistent with ide-explorer.css.

uppercase-letter-spaced-0-06em-titles.description: Uppercase letter-spaced 0.06em titles for section headers.

usecallback-wraps-fetchmetrics-so-the-po.description: useCallback wraps fetchMetrics so the polling effect's deps stay stable.

usememo-wraps-filter-and-counts-to.description: useMemo wraps filter and counts to avoid re-computation on every render.

user-can-choose-between-bare-template.description: User can choose between bare-template manual creation (CommandEditor with COMMAND_TEMPLATE) and AI-generated rich command (CommandGenerator).

uses-color-failed-css-variable-rather.description: Uses --color-failed CSS variable rather than a hardcoded red — themable across all 6 theme presets.

uses-unicode-escapes-for-icon-u26a0.description: Uses unicode escapes for icon (\u26A0 = warning triangle, \u2192 = right arrow) rather than emoji — consistent ASCII rendering across platforms.

viewer-state-machine-placeholder-view-ed.description: Viewer state machine ('placeholder'|'view'|'edit'|'generate') drives which sub-component renders — clean state isolation between view/edit/generate flows.

1-1-method-to-channel-mapping.description: 1:1 method-to-channel mapping organized by domain banner comments

absolute-path-resolution-via-cd-and.description: Absolute path resolution via cd-and-pwd with literal fallback

action-shape-type-namespace-action-paylo.description: Action shape: { type: 'NAMESPACE_ACTION', ...payload } — payload keys vary per action; switch cases destructure them inline.

active-state-determined-by-repo-id.description: Active state determined by `repo.id === gitActiveRepoId` — repo.id is the dispatch key, not the path (paths can be moved or duplicated).

active-tab-ref-callback-for-auto.description: Active-tab ref callback for auto-scroll-into-view (only set on isActive tab).

activity-throttling-only-nudge-if-no.description: Activity throttling: only nudge if no recent progress file activity (within 1 min)

after-every-remote-op-refreshafterremote.description: After every remote op, refreshAfterRemoteOp re-fetches gitStatus + gitLog + gitAheadBehind + gitBranches in parallel.

aggregate-then-fail-validation-collect-a.description: Aggregate-then-fail validation: collect all errors into ERRORS string, single block at end with all violations

aggregation-walk-single-pass-over-init.description: Aggregation walk: single pass over init.agents accumulates counts, summaries, and timing arrays simultaneously.

aggressive-lane-consolidation-computegra.description: Aggressive lane consolidation: computeGraphLayout finds ALL lanes that expect a hash and folds duplicates into the lowest lane — keeps the graph compact when branches converge.

ahead-behind-chips-render-with-arrow.description: Ahead/behind chips render with arrow icons (ArrowUpIcon green for ahead, ArrowDownIcon orange for behind), or a CheckIcon Synced badge.

ai-generation-reads-up-to-3.description: AI generation reads up to 3 example command files from the same target folder (truncated to 2000 chars each) for style transfer.

all-async-electronapi-calls-swallow-erro.description: All async electronAPI calls swallow errors with .catch(()=>{}) at the call site — failures are silent UX-wise.

all-chat-tab-actions-dispatch-through.description: All chat-tab actions dispatch through AppContext (CHAT_TAB_CREATE / CHAT_TAB_SWITCH / CHAT_TAB_RENAME / CHAT_TAB_DELETE / SET_CHAT_VIEW) — sidebar holds NO chat tab state itself.

all-file-writing-goes-through-safename.description: All file-writing goes through `safeName` sanitization to prevent path traversal in commandName.

all-mutations-flow-through-refreshstatus.description: All mutations flow through refreshStatus which re-fetches gitStatus and dispatches GIT_SET_STATUS to update sibling components (CommitPanel, BranchPanel).

all-panes-mounted-only-display-toggles.description: All panes mounted; only `display` toggles between flex/none — preserves scroll position and component state across tab switches.

all-paths-resolved-at-module-load.description: All paths resolved at module load via `path.resolve` / `path.join` — never relative.

all-renderer-notifications-are-pushed-ov.description: All renderer notifications are pushed over three named channels: `worker-output`, `worker-complete`, `worker-error` — kept stable so ipc-handlers/preload only needs to expose those three.

allow-list-of-permitted-tracker-subpaths.description: Allow-list of permitted tracker subpaths + active-swarm gate on everything else

anyoperationrunning-pushing-pulling-fetc.description: anyOperationRunning = pushing || pulling || fetching || gitLoading — single boolean disables ALL actions during any in-flight op.

api-routing-is-delegated-handleapiroute-.description: API routing is delegated: `handleApiRoute(req, res, url)` returns boolean indicating whether the route was handled, and the SSE branch + 404 fallback are local.

appendlog-always-re-reads-logs-json.description: appendLog always re-reads logs.json (defensive against external writers) and pushes a fixed schema {timestamp, task_id, agent, level, message, task_name}.

askuserquestion-tool-use-renders-an-inte.description: AskUserQuestion tool_use renders an interactive options card; submitting calls back through onSendAnswer→sendText to keep the chat as a normal turn.

async-db-style-reads-use-fs.description: Async DB-style reads use `fs.promises` via IIFE; sync mutations use `fs.writeFileSync` for in-request atomicity.

atomic-write-pattern-via-utils-json.description: Atomic write pattern via utils/json.writeAtomic — used for default file seeding to prevent half-written defaults if the process crashes during ensureDashboard.

atomic-write-write-to-path-tmp.description: Atomic write: write to `<path>.tmp`, rename to `<path>`. Best-effort cleanup of .tmp on failure.

back-to-explorer-button-esc-key.description: 'Back to Explorer' button + ESC key both flip ideSidebarView to 'explorer'.

banner-keypress-to-close-pattern-optimiz.description: Banner + keypress-to-close pattern: optimized for double-click UX where the Terminal window must stay open long enough for the user to read the result.

banner-pattern-prints-a-divider-title.description: Banner pattern: prints a divider/title before any action so the Terminal output is recognizable at a glance.

bfs-dependency-line-reuse-chat-dashboard.description: BFS dependency-line reuse: chat dashboard uses the SAME drawDependencyLines/setupCardHoverEffects helpers as the code dashboard, just scoped to a single lane's container/svg.

bfs-over-a-sparse-pathway-grid.description: BFS over a sparse pathway grid for non-overlapping line routing — avoids the visual mess of straight-through lines on dense pipelines.

block-level-processing-line-by-line.description: Block-level processing line-by-line with i counter (manual incrementing) — allows lookahead (table separator) and multi-line consumption.

block-message-includes-a-ready-to.description: Block message includes a ready-to-run cp command with $(date +...) substitution

broadcast-bridge-pattern-createbroadcast.description: Broadcast bridge pattern: createBroadcastFn returns a closure that mirrors the SSE broadcast signature so WatcherService is reused unchanged — only the transport differs (webContents.send vs SSE)

build-then-save-pattern-buildhistorysumm.description: Build-then-save pattern: buildHistorySummary is pure (no I/O writes), saveHistorySummary composes it with the write step — easy to test build logic in isolation.

cache-ref-pattern-progressref-current-da.description: Cache + ref pattern: progressRef.current[dashboardId] = ... lets stale-closure-safe IPC handlers read latest cache without depending on React state.

cascade-dispatch-every-route-is-a.description: Cascade dispatch — every route is a sequential if/return-true; no router lib.

chat-agent-allocation-4-hex-random.description: Chat agent allocation: 4-hex random with up to 1000 retries, uniqueness scoped across ALL chat dirs (not per-chat), folder layout Chat/chat{N}/agent{XXXX}/

cleardashboardsection-archives-before-cl.description: ClearDashboardSection archives BEFORE clearing — archiveDashboard then clearDashboard chained via .catch(() => {}) — failures swallowed silently.

click-guard-window-getselection-tostring.description: Click guard `window.getSelection().toString()` prevents accidental modal opens during text selection — also used in ChainPipeline cards.

coaching-style-posttooluse-emits-constru.description: Coaching-style PostToolUse: emits constructive message with the exact correction

collapsiblesection-is-a-reusable-inner-c.description: CollapsibleSection is a reusable inner component — used by all four sections for consistent header/chevron/count UI.

command-history-dedup-filter-out-duplica.description: Command history dedup: filter out duplicates of new expr first, then append → most recent at index length-1.

commit-button-shows-an-inline-staged.description: Commit button shows an inline staged-count badge (rounded pill with stagedCount) when not amending — visual confirmation of what will be committed.

compares-tracker-root-vs-project-root.description: Compares tracker_root vs project_root resolved via .synapse/project.json

computeelapsed-wrapped-in-usecallback-to.description: computeElapsed wrapped in useCallback to keep the effect's deps stable; effect cleans up the interval on completion or unmount.

conditional-rendering-of-debugtoolbar-de.description: Conditional rendering of DebugToolbar + DebugPanels only when debugSession.status !== 'idle' — they appear/disappear with the session.

conflict-check-pattern-same-port-busy.description: Conflict-check pattern: same port-busy check as start.sh, with the same 'use Stop Synapse.command' guidance.

context-split-for-performance-appcontext.description: Context split for performance: AppContext (state) + DispatchContext (dispatch) — components needing only dispatch import only useDispatch.

conversation-history-injected-only-on-fr.description: Conversation history injected only on FRESH sessions (no sessionId) — once a CLI --resume sessionId exists, the CLI owns history; injecting it again would double-context.

createroot-render-with-single-nested-pro.description: createRoot + .render with single nested provider — no React.StrictMode wrapper (intentional given IPC listener side-effects).

createworkspacedashboard-call-wrapped-in.description: createWorkspaceDashboard call wrapped in inner try/catch so welcome action doesn't fail if dashboard creation fails.

cross-component-navigation-pattern-exter.description: Cross-component navigation pattern: external code dispatches { key:'ideNavigateToLine', value: { filePath, line, column, ts } } → CodeEditor effect compares filePath and reveals/sets position. The `ts` field forces re-trigger on identical line.

cross-isolation-message-passing-window-p.description: Cross-isolation message passing: window.postMessage in webview -> console.log with __SYNAPSE_EDIT__ prefix -> host console-message listener parses JSON.

cross-worker-write-detection-expectedtas.description: Cross-worker write detection: `expectedTaskId` mismatch in progress data returns false AND logs to stderr — this is a hook-enforced security boundary.

custom-header-inside-body-rather-than.description: Custom header inside body rather than using Modal title — gives more typographic control.

dangerlevel-mapping-safe-pull-push-fetch.description: Dangerlevel mapping: safe (pull/push/fetch/sync/save/stash/stashPop), warning (undoCommit, moveBranch via inline dialog), danger (discardAll with type-to-confirm).

dashboard-render-keys-off-id-itemclasses.description: Dashboard render keys off id; itemClasses array is filtered+joined to avoid stray spaces.

dashboard-scoped-settings-via-localstora.description: Dashboard-scoped settings via localStorage (dashboardProjects helpers) — same pattern used by ChatInstanceView and PlanningModal for additional-context dirs.

dashboard-status-derivation-mirrors-src-.description: Dashboard status derivation mirrors src/server/routes/apiRoutes.js (deriveDashboardStatus duplicated) — keeping IPC and HTTP responses identical when both modes are used

data-resize-edge-attribute-selector-for.description: data-resize-edge attribute selector for delegated handle detection — handles are siblings inside the panel; click on any handle reads its edge from dataset.

date-stamping-uses-new-date-toisostring.description: Date stamping uses `new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)` (UTC) — same convention as ArchiveService, ensures dates align across both systems.

debounced-diagnostics-500ms-re-run-after.description: Debounced diagnostics (500ms) re-run after save (handleSave calls runDiagnostics) and on file load.

debounced-reconciliation-cleartimeout-se.description: Debounced reconciliation (clearTimeout + setTimeout RECONCILE_DEBOUNCE_MS) on top-level fs.watch — prevents thundering-herd reconciles when dashboards/ receives multiple events in a burst.

debounced-search-author-filters-use-ref.description: Debounced search/author filters use ref-tracked setTimeout to avoid firing per keystroke.

debounced-search-input-300ms-enter-for.description: Debounced search input (300ms) + Enter for immediate execution.

debounced-window-state-persistence-500ms.description: Debounced window state persistence (500ms) — settings writes are I/O and would otherwise hammer disk during drag-resize

default-fallback-get-returns-cache-value.description: Default-fallback get(): returns cache value if present, else DEFAULTS, else undefined — guarantees no thrown errors for missing keys

default-fallbacks-via-default-initializa.description: Default fallbacks via `{ ...DEFAULT_INITIALIZATION }` and `{ ...DEFAULT_LOGS }` (spread to avoid shared-reference mutation) when reads return null.

default-shape-constants-default-are-mini.description: Default-shape constants (`DEFAULT_*`) are minimal valid documents that pass schema validation in utils/json.js.

default-sidebar-width-300-min-220.description: DEFAULT_SIDEBAR_WIDTH (300) / MIN (220) / MAX (500) — clamp logic uses Math.min(MAX, Math.max(MIN, ...)).

defense-in-depth-paired-with-enforce.description: Defense in depth: paired with enforce-dashboard-isolation.sh (Edit|Write) for bash-level coverage

defensive-id-validation-buildsystempromp.description: Defensive ID validation: buildSystemPrompt throws on invalid dashboardId rather than letting the worker write into the wrong dashboard.

defensive-try-catch-wrapping-listarchive.description: Defensive try/catch wrapping listArchives so missing/unreadable Archive dir returns [] rather than throwing into route handlers.

dependency-aware-emission-status-complet.description: Dependency-aware emission: status==='completed' triggers a delayed computeNewlyUnblocked + 'tasks_unblocked' SSE — the orchestrator (Electron SwarmOrchestrator) listens and dispatches the next wave automatically.

design-tokens-via-css-custom-properties.description: Design tokens via CSS custom properties on :root.

diagnostics-multi-language-dispatch-via-.description: Diagnostics multi-language dispatch via ideDiagLanguage(filePath) -> {ideDiagJSON, ideDiagJS, ideDiagCSS}

direct-style-mutation-inside-raf-for.description: Direct style.* mutation inside rAF for drag/resize — avoids React re-render thrashing and keeps drags at native frame rate.

dirty-clean-state-is-dual-tracked.description: Dirty/clean state is dual-tracked: originalContentRef (local, for editor) + IDE_MARK_FILE_DIRTY action (global, for tabs).

dirty-indicator-is-a-css-only.description: Dirty indicator is a CSS-only dot via 'editor-tab-dirty' class with bullet character (visual only, not text).

disk-sync-as-opt-in-side.description: Disk-sync as opt-in side-effect (only when window.electronAPI.saveAdditionalContext exists) — keeps utility usable in standalone-server mode.

document-level-mousedown-listener-patter.description: Document-level mousedown listener pattern with ref+open-state for outside-click dropdown dismissal — repeated in ModeMenu, QueuePopup, Sidebar, ClaudeView quick-access editor.

drag-enter-leave-uses-a-counter.description: drag enter/leave uses a counter (dragCounterRef) to handle nested elements correctly — without this, hovering over a child of the drop target fires extra leave events.

drag-handle-uses-dragstateref-rafref-no.description: Drag handle uses `dragStateRef` + `rafRef` (no React state during drag) to avoid re-render storms; `bottom-panel-resizing` body class disables hover effects across the app while dragging.

draggable-divider-via-mousedown-document.description: Draggable divider via mousedown→document mousemove/mouseup with ref-stored startX/startWidth.

drawdependencylines-is-invoked-both-insi.description: drawDependencyLines is invoked both inside the main effect AND inside the ResizeObserver callback to handle layout shifts after initial draw.

dual-entry-point-for-opening-workspaces.description: Dual entry point for opening workspaces: this component (cold-start welcome) and WorkspaceTabs (when workspaces exist). Both should use the same IDE_OPEN_WORKSPACE + createWorkspaceDashboard sequence.

dual-pattern-check-allow-if-under.description: Dual-pattern check: allow if under tracker_root, block if matches dashboard shape outside it

each-event-type-pretooluse-posttooluse-s.description: Each event type (PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop) is an array of {matcher, hooks[]} groups

eager-auto-create-of-parent-directory.description: Eager auto-create of parent directory in _save() via fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true })

edit-write-asymmetry-edits-trust-writes.description: Edit/Write asymmetry: Edits trust, Writes validate

electron-main-process-service-module-exp.description: Electron main-process service module exported via CommonJS and consumed by ipc-handlers or orchestration services.

electron-only-ui-gated-via-useiselectron.description: Electron-only UI gated via useIsElectron() so SSE-only browser mode hides Commands.

embedded-bottompanel-embedded-prop-in-bo.description: Embedded BottomPanel (`embedded` prop) in both welcome and main layouts.

empty-disabled-state-uses-dbg-empty.description: Empty/disabled state uses 'dbg-empty' class with messages like 'Not paused', 'No call frames', 'No breakpoints set'.

empty-state-pattern-git-manager-empty.description: Empty-state pattern: git-manager-empty container + git-manager-empty-icon + title + text + primary action button.

errors-block-warnings-inform-only-errors.description: Errors block, warnings inform: only errors flip `valid: false`.

event-delegation-via-capture-phase-singl.description: Event delegation via capture phase — single listener on container handles all card hover events.

event-keys-combine-timestamp-index-to.description: Event keys combine timestamp + index to disambiguate co-located events.

event-payload-normalization-on-callback-.description: Event payload normalization: 'on' callback receives only the data argument (event stripped) — keeps renderer code free of Electron internals

expandable-rows-render-a-commitdetails-s.description: Expandable rows render a CommitDetails sub-component below the row with metadata, files-changed, and optional on-demand diff.

extracttextcontent-strips-jsx-expression.description: extractTextContent strips JSX expressions and child tags then collapses whitespace — surfaces only the literal text, matching what the user sees in the preview overlay.

fail-fast-pattern-refuse-to-start.description: Fail-fast pattern: refuse to start when conflict is detected, with a hint pointing the user at the matching `stop.sh`.

falls-back-to-default-initialization-dee.description: Falls back to DEFAULT_INITIALIZATION (deep-cloned via JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...))) if the dashboard has no init file yet.

fetch-interception-via-window-fetch-reas.description: Fetch interception via window.fetch reassignment guarded by window.electronAPI presence — same pattern works for any Electron-React app needing browser-style fetch over IPC.

filter-toggles-are-buttons-with-active.description: Filter toggles are buttons with 'active' modifier class; clicking flips activeFilters[severity].

fixed-height-bars-36px-with-min.description: Fixed-height bars (36px) with min-height + height + flex-shrink:0 lock zones.

folder-name-extraction-replace-trailing-.description: Folder name extraction: replace trailing slashes, split on / or \, take last segment — handles cross-platform paths.

folder-name-extraction-via-split-pop.description: Folder name extraction via .split(/[/\\]/).pop() — handles both POSIX and Windows.

font-preconnect-pattern-preconnect-cross.description: Font preconnect pattern (preconnect + crossorigin) for performance — present even though the app is desktop and cold-start performance is dominated by Electron startup.

forwarding-broadcast-wrapper-for-autoupd.description: Forwarding broadcast wrapper for AutoUpdateService: every emit checks win.isDestroyed() and webContents.isDestroyed() before send to avoid 'Object has been destroyed' errors during shutdown

four-phase-validation-self-ref-dangling.description: Four-phase validation: self_ref -> dangling_ref -> cycle -> orphan. Each phase appends to errors/warnings independently — all checks always run, no short-circuit.

fuzzy-archive-matching-by-either-dashboa.description: Fuzzy archive matching by either dashboard ID or sanitized task name

getfileicon-uses-ext-tolowercase-of-last.description: getFileIcon uses ext.toLowerCase() of last dot segment; multi-extension files like .test.js resolve as 'js'.

git-operations-use-execfile-array-args.description: git operations use execFile + array args (never shell concat) for injection safety; all wrapped in gitExec() with consistent { success, data | error } envelope

glass-surfaces-rgba-255-255-255.description: Glass surfaces: rgba(255,255,255,0.04) on dark bg with subtle border rgba(255,255,255,0.08).

glass-surfaces-using-surface-and-border.description: Glass surfaces using --surface and --border tokens consumed from index.css.

glob-based-command-pattern-matching-for.description: Glob-based command pattern matching for write redirects targeting tracker file shapes

global-events-no-dashboardid-in-payload.description: Global events (no `dashboardId` in payload) bypass filter — `dashboards_list` and `queue_changed` reach all clients regardless of subscription.

graceful-degradation-demo-data-is-the.description: Graceful degradation: demo data is the fallback for both 'no API' and 'API failed' branches — chat dashboard never blanks out.

graceful-shutdown-stops-watchers-before-.description: Graceful shutdown stops watchers BEFORE heartbeat BEFORE SSE close — mirrors the reverse order of startup.

gradient-header-glow-via-after-pseudo.description: Gradient header glow via ::after pseudo-element with linear-gradient + filter: blur.

graph-lane-colors-derive-from-getcompute.description: Graph lane colors derive from getComputedStyle (--color-in-progress) at module load, then use a fixed palette of 10 stable colors keyed by lane index.

graphcell-uses-cubic-bezier-curves-to.description: GraphCell uses cubic-Bezier curves to draw merge connections with 0.4 vertical control offsets — keeps merge curves visually smooth across rows.

hand-rolled-jsx-aware-tag-closer.description: Hand-rolled JSX-aware tag closer (findTagClose) instead of using a JSX/babel parser — keeps the dependency surface tiny but means tricky edge cases (TS generics, escaped templates) are unsupported.

handlecloseworkspace-is-a-4-step-ordered.description: handleCloseWorkspace is a 4-step ordered cascade: get mapping → switch away if current → close in state → delete on disk → REMOVE_DASHBOARD action.

hard-coded-budgets-top-8-relevant.description: Hard-coded budgets: top-8 relevant files, top-15 patterns, top-10 conventions, top-8 insights, last-5 swarm insights — keeps the PKI block under ~100 lines.

hard-schema-guards-in-validateandbroadca.description: Hard schema guards in validateAndBroadcast (task_id matches filename, dashboard_id matches directory) — guards against cross-dashboard write contamination, broadcasts 'write_rejected' for UI surfacing. NOTE: this function is currently NOT wired into the live path.

header-comment-mirrors-taskdetailsmodal-.description: Header comment 'Mirrors TaskDetailsModal.js' — JSX rewrite of vanilla.

health-check-via-interval-polling-lastev.description: Health-check via interval polling lastEventTime — preferred over connection events from main process which are not pushed.

helper-trio-getagents-getdependson-resol.description: Helper trio (getAgents, getDependsOn, resolveTaskStatus) defensively handle missing/non-array fields — defends against partial initialization.json writes.

helpful-block-message-includes-the-corre.description: Helpful block message includes the corrected absolute path so the agent can retry

hook-enforced-protocol-gate-referenced-b.description: Hook-enforced protocol gate referenced by skill prose ('NON-NEGOTIABLE')

html-escape-before-applying-tags-so.description: HTML-escape before applying tags so output is XSS-safe — the inverse order would produce bypasses.

id-keyed-activeterminals-map-with-cleanu.description: ID-keyed activeTerminals map with cleanup-on-exit — onExit handler deletes the entry before broadcasting.

idempotent-existing-data-synapse-label-a.description: Idempotent: existing data-synapse-label attributes are detected and skipped via simple substring search of the attrs slice.

idempotent-shutdown-running-stop-sh-twic.description: Idempotent shutdown: running stop.sh twice is harmless (second call exits with 'Synapse is not running').

imperative-dom-querying-for-cards-querys.description: Imperative DOM querying for cards (`querySelectorAll('.agent-card[data-agent-id]')`) instead of refs — necessary because cards are rendered dynamically.

in-flight-promise-map-pattern-map.description: In-flight promise map pattern — Map<key, Promise> deduplicates concurrent async creators. Reusable for any async-create-once workflow.

incremental-vs-full-scan-pair-getdispatc.description: Incremental-vs-full scan pair: getDispatchableTasks (O(agents * deps)) for cold start, computeNewlyUnblocked (O(downstream_of_completed)) for hot path — invoked by WatcherService DEPENDENCY_CHECK_DELAY_MS after a completion event.

index-aware-log-search-find-latest.description: Index-aware log search: find latest permission entry, then check info entries at higher indices

initial-data-burst-pattern-sendinitialda.description: Initial-data burst pattern (sendInitialData): on window-ready, push dashboards_list + initialization + all_progress + queue_changed for every dashboard — mirrors what an SSE client would receive on /events connect

initial-state-bootstrap-reads-localstora.description: Initial state bootstrap reads localStorage synchronously at module-load time (savedWorkspaces, savedGitRepos, savedChatTabs, etc.) — first-render shows persisted state.

inline-defined-confirmdialog-and-mergepr.description: Inline-defined ConfirmDialog and MergePreviewDialog (NOT shared with SafetyDialogs.jsx) — closes on Escape via window keydown listener.

inline-overlay-bridge-injection-via-wv.description: Inline overlay/bridge injection via wv.executeJavaScript after did-finish-load; overlayInjectedRef gates duplicate injection per-page.

inline-statusbadge-sub-component-is-dupl.description: Inline StatusBadge sub-component is duplicated across AgentDetails.jsx and TaskDetails.jsx — they share visual style but are NOT extracted to a shared module.

inline-style-overrides-allow-per-status.description: Inline style overrides allow per-status border/background while keeping all layout in CSS classes.

inline-svg-icons-for-every-action.description: Inline SVG icons for every action (Play, Pause, StepOver, StepInto, StepOut, Restart, Stop, Launch) — no external icon library.

jq-cross-field-assertions-sum-waves.description: jq cross-field assertions (sum(waves[].total) == agents.length, every wave referenced exists, etc.)

kahn-s-algorithm-for-cycle-detection.description: Kahn's algorithm for cycle detection: build in-degree + adjacency, BFS from in-degree-0 nodes, cycle iff sorted.length < total.

killterminal-calls-proc-kill-with-no.description: killTerminal calls proc.kill() with no signal arg — node-pty defaults to SIGHUP which closes the PTY cleanly.

killworker-double-tap-sigterm-then-a.description: killWorker double-tap: SIGTERM, then a 5s SIGKILL fallback to guarantee dead workers.

language-detection-via-signature-file-lo.description: Language detection via signature-file lookup table (DETECT_FILES).

lastmessage-roundtrip-via-tmpfile-becaus.description: lastMessage roundtrip via tmpfile because Codex doesn't surface the final assistant message in NDJSON the way Claude does.

launch-sequence-pattern-cd-dirname-0.description: Launch sequence pattern: `cd $(dirname $0)` → ensure deps → exec dev/start command.

layered-ignore-pattern-granular-ignores-.description: Layered ignore pattern: granular ignores at the top (specific files) plus broad wildcard ignores at the bottom (entire directories) — the wildcard wins, so the granular rules are de facto redundant in this repo.

layout-via-flex-containers-with-fixed.description: Layout via flex containers with fixed heights and flex-shrink:0 lock-zones.

lazy-directory-loading-setloadingpaths-p.description: Lazy directory loading: setLoadingPaths(prev → add) → ideListDir → dispatch IDE_UPDATE_FILE_TREE_NODE → setLoadingPaths(prev → delete).

lazy-disconnect-reaping-on-every-broadca.description: Lazy disconnect reaping on every broadcast iteration — no separate sweep timer.

lazy-file-location-resolution-via-electr.description: Lazy file location resolution via electronApp.getPath('userData') in init() — the path is platform-specific and can only be obtained after app.whenReady

lazy-install-pattern-only-run-npm.description: Lazy install pattern: only run `npm install` when `node_modules/` is missing — keeps subsequent launches fast.

lazy-progress-watcher-creation-wrapped-i.description: Lazy progress watcher creation — wrapped in try/catch so a missing progress/ directory doesn't fail the watcher setup (ensureDashboard creates it, but defense in depth).

lazy-require-inside-function-body-requir.description: Lazy require inside function body (`require('./DashboardService')`) used as a circular-dep-avoidance pattern.

lazy-require-inside-lifecycle-handlers-r.description: Lazy require() inside lifecycle handlers (require('./settings'), require('./ipc-handlers')) so module load order doesn't trigger early instantiation

lifecycle-initautoupdater-broadcast-at-a.description: Lifecycle: initAutoUpdater(broadcast) at app ready -> auto event-driven updates -> disposeAutoUpdater() on quit.

listener-cleanup-uses-listenersref-curre.description: Listener cleanup uses listenersRef.current array of {channel, handle} — handle is the function returned by api.on(), called to unsubscribe.

live-updates-pattern-window-electronapi-.description: Live-updates pattern: `window.electronAPI.on('chat_dashboard_changed', () => loadData())`; the cleanup function returned by the IPC bridge MUST be invoked in useEffect cleanup.

local-remote-sections-use-independent-co.description: Local + remote sections use independent collapse state (localCollapsed default open, remoteCollapsed default closed).

lookup-map-agentmap-built-once-per.description: Lookup map (agentMap) built once per render to avoid quadratic scans inside nested loops.

map-based-watcher-registry-dashboardwatc.description: Map-based watcher registry (dashboardWatchers) keyed by id — single source of truth for active watchers, used by reconcileDashboards to compute add/remove deltas.

markdown-introspection-by-simple-regex-o.description: Markdown introspection by simple regex on H1 + **Purpose:** + **Syntax:** lines — no full markdown parser dependency.

matcher-is-a-regex-like-alternation.description: Matcher is a regex-like alternation: 'Edit|Write' matches both tools

math-ceil-rounding-so-token-estimates.description: Math.ceil rounding so token estimates never under-report.

merge-action-loads-a-preview-by.description: Merge action loads a preview by running `gitLog(repoPath, 50, [`${currentBranch}..${sourceBranch}`])` to display the commits that would be merged.

mergestate-is-pure-init-progress-logs.description: mergeState is pure (init+progress+logs in, status object out) — easy to test and reuse outside the hook.

mid-write-resilience-readjsonwithretry-w.description: Mid-write resilience: `readJSONWithRetry` waits 80ms and retries once before giving up — designed for fs.watch races against worker writes.

mirror-of-dashboardservice-api-surface-s.description: Mirror of DashboardService API surface — same function names with `Queue` prefix. Maintained intentionally so consumers can swap dashboards/queue accessors with minimal change.

mirrors-claudecodeservice-s-pid-keyed-ac.description: Mirrors ClaudeCodeService's PID-keyed activeWorkers + 3-channel broadcast pattern (`worker-output`, `worker-complete`, `worker-error`) so callers can swap providers transparently.

modal-closes-on-escape-via-window.description: Modal closes on Escape via window keydown listener attached only when modalOpen.

modal-dispatch-uses-type-open-modal.description: Modal dispatch uses { type: 'OPEN_MODAL', modal, dashboardId } and { type: 'CLOSE_MODAL' } — modal name (not boolean) drives which modal renders; activeModal is single-string-or-null in state.

modal-state-lives-in-this-component.description: Modal state lives in this component (taskEditorOpen + editingTask) and the modal is conditionally mounted only when open.

module-level-breakpoint-state-allbreakpo.description: Module-level breakpoint state (allBreakpoints Map) survives React unmount; component-level refs hold per-mount editor instance + decoration IDs.

module-level-singleton-state-object-shar.description: Module-level singleton state object shared by every event handler; mutation through `setState(patch)` triggers an `emit()` that broadcasts the entire snapshot to the renderer.

module-scoped-cache-for-expensive-comput.description: Module-scoped cache for expensive computation (grid + paths) — invalidated by layout-rect change-key.

module-scoped-mainwindow-let-with-getmai.description: Module-scoped mainWindow let with getMainWindow() accessor passed by reference to dependencies (registerIPCHandlers, AutoUpdateService) — allows late binding because the window may not exist when handlers are registered

mtime-based-cache-invalidation-cachedmti.description: mtime-based cache invalidation: `cachedMtimes[file] !== fs.statSync(file).mtimeMs` triggers full rescan.

multi-check-aggregator-with-single-emiss.description: Multi-check aggregator with single emission at the end

multi-dashboard-sweep-with-per-dashboard.description: Multi-dashboard sweep with per-dashboard completion scan

multi-effect-debug-ipc-subscription-patt.description: Multi-effect debug IPC subscription pattern: an array of cleanup functions accumulated then iterated on unmount.

multi-source-project-context-primary-cla.description: Multi-source project context: primary CLAUDE.md + additional context dirs are merged into a single contexts[] array, later partitioned in SwarmOrchestrator.dispatchReady by path-prefix match.

multi-step-modal-flow-with-refs.description: Multi-step modal flow with refs (pickedProjectRef, projectSavedRef, pendingChatKeyRef) to bridge async user choices into a single finalize call — refs are used because the values must NOT trigger re-renders.

mutable-constant-maps-initialized-once-p.description: Mutable constant maps initialized once per app boot — preferred over re-deriving on every component render.

navigation-callbacks-onnavigatetoframe-o.description: Navigation callbacks (onNavigateToFrame, onNavigateToBreakpoint) are PROP-DRIVEN — the panel itself never dispatches navigation; IDEView wires up the file-open + ideNavigateToLine flow.

object-keyed-by-task-id-return.description: Object-keyed-by-task_id return shape for progress: callers (DependencyService, HistoryService, WatcherService) all assume `progressMap[task_id]` lookup.

on-connect-state-replay-send-dashboards.description: On-connect state replay: send dashboards_list -> per-dashboard initialization -> per-dashboard progress -> per-dashboard combined init_state -> queue_changed, so a fresh client renders without polling.

one-json-file-per-conversation-in.description: One JSON file per conversation in CONVERSATIONS_DIR (no index file). listConversations re-reads every file on every call.

one-shot-mount-time-recovery-effect.description: One-shot mount-time recovery effect via useRef boolean guard — recreates missing dashboards after app restart.

operation-errors-show-in-a-banner.description: Operation errors show in a banner above the lists and auto-clear after 8 seconds.

optimistic-ui-setarchives-prev-filter-is.description: Optimistic UI: setArchives prev.filter(...) is called before any server confirmation in fallback path — diverges from convention where server confirms first.

optional-args-forwarded-as-is-to.description: Optional-args forwarded as-is to the handler so backend can apply defaults

optional-dashboardid-surface-filtering-h.description: Optional dashboardId+surface filtering happens server-side rather than client-side.

optional-sections-deps-meta-files-progre.description: Optional sections (deps, meta, files, progress, milestones, deviations, logs) are conditionally rendered with truthy guards — empty data shows nothing rather than empty placeholders.

output-augmentation-returned-agent-objec.description: Output augmentation: returned agent objects are spread copies with an extra `dependency_status` field — original initialization.json data is not mutated.

outside-click-pattern-useref-useeffect-a.description: Outside-click pattern: useRef + useEffect + addEventListener('mousedown') gated by open state; identical to Header archive dropdown.

parallel-data-load-via-promise-all.description: Parallel data load via Promise.all — five endpoints fire concurrently; each is null-checked in case the API surface evolves.

parsedashboardroute-pathname-regex-api-d.description: `parseDashboardRoute(pathname)` regex `^/api/dashboards/([^/]+)(?:/(.*))?$` captures id + optional subpath in one match, so all `/api/dashboards/:id/<subpath>` endpoints share the same validated id.

path-prepend-pattern-ensure-homebrew-bin.description: PATH-prepend pattern: ensure Homebrew bin dirs are present even if the user's profile didn't add them.

path-relative-label-entries-path-relativ.description: Path-relative label entries (`path.relative(projectPath, filePath)`) so the renderer-side overlay can treat them as portable strings.

path-traversal-defense-via-sanitizepathp.description: Path traversal defense via `sanitizePathParam`: rejects `..`, `/`, `\`, and anything outside `[a-zA-Z0-9_.\-]` (must start with alphanumeric or underscore), max 100 chars.

pattern-alias-to-the-renderer-only.description: Pattern: '@' alias to the renderer-only directory keeps the boundary between Electron main and React renderer enforceable via import paths.

pattern-build-chain-vite-build-produces.description: Pattern: build chain — `vite build` → produces dist/ → Electron loads dist/index.html via app:// protocol (per electron/main.js).

pattern-dev-chain-concurrently-k-vite.description: Pattern: dev chain — `concurrently -k "vite" "electron ."` runs Vite dev server (port 5174 per vite.config.js) AND Electron in parallel; -k kills both when one exits.

pattern-extraresources-files-separation-.description: Pattern: extraResources + files separation — files are bundled into the asar archive, extraResources are copied alongside (so dashboards/ stays writable on disk after install).

pattern-native-module-rebuild-electron-r.description: Pattern: native module rebuild — `electron-rebuild` pins node-pty's binary ABI to the installed Electron version every time deps change.

pattern-relative-base-for-electron-requi.description: Pattern: relative `base` for Electron — required for any Vite app loaded from a non-HTTP origin.

pattern-worker-pre-bundling-for-monaco.description: Pattern: worker pre-bundling for Monaco — the canonical Vite + Monaco recipe.

pending-as-default-for-missing-progress.description: Pending-as-default for missing progress: resolveTaskStatus returns 'pending' for any task without a progress file — this is the correct semantics for unblock checks.

per-client-dashboard-filtering-via-dashb.description: Per-client dashboard filtering via `?dashboard=` query param stored in client metadata, used later by `broadcast` to skip non-matching clients.

per-client-metadata-dashboardfilter-stor.description: Per-client metadata (dashboardFilter) stored in the Map value, not the response object — keeps response untouched and enables future per-client options without prototype pollution.

per-dashboard-isolation-via-termstate-da.description: Per-dashboard isolation via `termState[dashboardId]` map; effect ensures every dashboardId has a record before tabs render.

per-provider-sub-state-clipath-defaultmo.description: Per-provider sub-state: cliPath, defaultModel, MODEL_OPTIONS keyed by provider — clean swap when provider changes.

per-section-total-reporting-with-flag.description: Per-section + total reporting with [!] flag at 40% of budget threshold.

per-task-field-completeness-check-via.description: Per-task field completeness check via jq array-of-missings construction

per-workspace-open-files-state-lives.description: Per-workspace open-files state lives in AppContext (not local) — switching workspaces preserves each one's tabs.

persisted-ordering-reconciliation-getord.description: Persisted ordering reconciliation: getOrderedDashboards filters meta.order against existing IDs, appends new ones by creation time, ensures 'ide' first, then writes back the reconciled order — self-healing across filesystem changes

persistence-helpers-loadsaved-save-live-.description: Persistence helpers (loadSaved*, save*) live in the file with try/catch around localStorage to handle quota/private-browsing — never let a localStorage failure crash the app.

pid-keyed-activeworkers-map-is-the.description: PID-keyed activeWorkers map is the single source of truth; every callback (stdout/stderr/close/error) checks-and-mutates this map.

pki-auto-enrichment-runs-at-prompt.description: PKI auto-enrichment runs at prompt-build time — workers don't see knowledge unless their task title/description match an indexed domain/tag/concept.

pki-integration-feeds-synapse-knowledge-.description: PKI integration: feeds .synapse/knowledge/ manifest from worker tool calls

placeholder-restore-pattern-fenced-code-.description: Placeholder + restore pattern (fenced code blocks → \x00CODE_BLOCK_N\x00 → restored at end) — keeps protected content untouched by intermediate transforms.

pointer-events-setpointercapture-is-more.description: Pointer events + setPointerCapture is more robust than mouse events for window-leaving drags — use this pattern for any custom drag UI.

port-as-singleton-pattern-use-a.description: Port-as-singleton pattern: use a known listening port to detect whether the app is already running, instead of a PID file.

post-swarm-knowledge-extraction-deviatio.description: Post-swarm knowledge extraction: deviation severity drives insight category (CRITICAL -> dependency_insights, MODERATE -> architecture_notes, failed status -> failure_patterns).

posttooluse-atomic-json-manifest-update-.description: PostToolUse atomic JSON manifest update with write-then-rename idiom

pre-write-gate-enforcing-planning-artifa.description: Pre-write gate enforcing planning artifact existence (plan.json BEFORE initialization.json)

pretooluse-bash-matcher-with-stdin-tool.description: PreToolUse Bash matcher with stdin tool_input.command

pretooluse-edit-write-matcher-with-stdin.description: PreToolUse Edit|Write matcher with stdin tool_input.file_path

production-launch-pattern-build-via-vite.description: Production-launch pattern: build via Vite, then exec Electron — same as `npm start`.

profile-sourcing-pattern-explicitly-load.description: Profile-sourcing pattern: explicitly load `~/.zshrc` and `~/.bash_profile` because Finder's GUI launch context lacks them.

progresssection-extracts-active-task-fro.description: ProgressSection extracts active_task from currentStatus; it computes display values inline rather than receiving props because mergeState in useDashboardData already populates totals.

project-name-shown-in-action-bar.description: Project name shown in action bar is derived by stripping trailing slashes and pop()-ing last path segment — same algorithm used in ClaudeFloatingHeader.

promise-bridged-cdp-commands-every-sendc.description: Promise-bridged CDP commands: every sendCDPCommand attaches a one-shot `message` listener that filters by `id`, with timeout cleanup.

protocol-fallback-chain-direct-path-dist.description: Protocol fallback chain: direct path -> dist/ -> public/ — accommodates both Vite-built assets and legacy public/ files

provider-agnostic-agent-spawn-settings-a.description: Provider-agnostic agent spawn: settings.agentProvider toggles between claude/codex, settings.{provider}CliPath supplies binary path. Same pattern in ProjectModal, ChatInstanceView, etc.

provider-agnostic-worker-dispatch-claude.description: Provider-agnostic worker dispatch: ClaudeCodeService and CodexService share the spawnWorker(opts) signature, swapped at call site.

provider-field-on-every-event-payload.description: Provider field on every event payload (`provider: 'codex'`) lets the renderer distinguish events when both providers run side-by-side.

pseudo-id-namespace-chat-tabs-masquerade.description: Pseudo-id namespace: chat tabs masquerade as dashboards via the 'chat-agent-' prefix, letting per-dashboard utilities (project storage, processing-stash, unread counts) work uniformly across both surfaces.

pseudo-id-project-storage-chat-tabs.description: Pseudo-id project storage: chat tabs reuse the dashboardProjects localStorage util by passing 'chat-agent-<hex>' (or transient 'pending-chat-<ts>') instead of a real dashboard slug.

pty-based-terminal-sessions-with-streami.description: PTY-based terminal sessions with streaming via the `terminal-output` push channel.

pure-derivation-from-state-via-usememo.description: Pure-derivation-from-state via useMemo — no local mutation of diagnostics.

pure-functions-no-react-no-state.description: Pure functions — no React, no state — usable inside render loops freely.

pure-http-server-no-express-koa.description: Pure-http server (no Express/Koa) — every endpoint is a manual `if (url.pathname === ... && req.method === ...)` branch.

pure-localstorage-helpers-async-create-w.description: Pure-localStorage helpers + async create-with-IPC pattern — same shape as dashboardProjects.js.

pure-localstorage-helpers-no-react-state.description: Pure localStorage helpers — no React state. Components call these directly and re-render via dispatch when they care.

pure-prop-component-no-appcontext-no.description: Pure-prop component — no AppContext, no IPC. Reusable in isolation/storybook.

push-event-subscription-in-useeffect-wit.description: Push-event subscription in useEffect with cleanup function returned from window.electronAPI.on() — the API returns its own unsubscribe function.

re-merge-effect-useeffect-with-deps.description: Re-merge effect: useEffect with deps [currentInit, currentProgress, currentLogs] dispatches SET_STATUS — keeps currentStatus derived but in-store for cheap component reads.

reactive-dispatch-loop-every-ontaskcompl.description: Reactive dispatch loop: every onTaskComplete / onTaskFailed / resumeSwarm calls dispatchReady() which scans the agents[] for tasks with all deps satisfied and spawns workers for them.

read-fail-silently-pattern-try-return.description: Read-fail-silently pattern: `try {return JSON.parse(readFileSync(p))} catch {return null}` — callers branch on null.

read-modify-write-pattern-every-public.description: Read-modify-write pattern: every public function reads init, mutates it, calls writeInit().

recalcwaves-agentlist-wavelist-is-called.description: recalcWaves(agentList, waveList) is called everywhere the agents change to keep wave counts in sync and prune empty waves.

recalcwaves-enforces-invariants-wave-tot.description: recalcWaves enforces invariants: wave.total reflects current agents, empty waves are pruned, init.task.total_tasks/total_waves are updated.

refresh-after-commit-fires-gitstatus-git.description: Refresh after commit fires gitStatus + gitLog in parallel via Promise.all — both must complete before onCommitComplete is invoked.

refresh-callback-refreshgitdata-is-passe.description: Refresh callback (refreshGitData) is passed to CommitPanel onCommitComplete — used to re-fetch everything after a commit lands.

refs-for-everything-that-should-not.description: Refs for everything that should not trigger re-renders: terminalRef, fitAddonRef, terminalIdRef, isDisposedRef, spawnRef.

renderer-push-channel-is-update-status.description: Renderer push channel is `update-status`; the snapshot is the source of truth (no incremental diffs).

renderer-push-events-use-4-channels.description: Renderer push events use 4 channels: `debug-paused`, `debug-resumed`, `debug-output`, `debug-stopped`. The paused payload includes callStack, scopes, pausedFile, pausedLine, hitBreakpoints — enough for a full IDE pause UI in one frame.

replanning-banner-detection-lives-in-mer.description: Replanning banner detection lives in mergeState (useDashboardData), not here — App just renders if task.overall_status === 'replanning'.

resizeobserver-tied-to-the-container-on.description: ResizeObserver tied to the container; on observe-fire it fits AND notifies PTY of cols/rows so the shell wraps correctly.

resolution-fallback-pattern-explicit-fla.description: Resolution-fallback pattern: explicit flag → this file → CWD (per CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md path-convention sections).

restart-on-keypress-pattern-terminal-ond.description: Restart-on-keypress pattern: terminal.onData() handler re-arms only when `exited` becomes true.

result-toast-with-auto-dismiss-after.description: Result toast with auto-dismiss after 5s — type 'success'|'error'|'warning' maps to color tokens.

reuse-by-prop-same-claudeview-component.description: Reuse-by-prop: same ClaudeView component renders in two surfaces (code-floating-panel and chat-instance) — distinguished only by `tab`/`surface` props, not by a separate component.

reuses-git-manager-empty-container-class.description: Reuses git-manager-empty container class for the centered card — same style as GitWelcome.

reverse-sorted-match-application-in-ide.description: Reverse-sorted match application in ide-search-replace (sort by line desc, column desc) so earlier replacements don't shift positions of later ones

runtime-vs-source-separation-every-direc.description: Runtime-vs-source separation: every directory that holds runtime swarm artifacts (dashboards, tasks, Archive, history, queue) is excluded; everything else (electron/, src/, _commands/, agent/, documentation/) is tracked.

same-header-comment-notes-mirrors-archiv.description: Same header comment notes 'Mirrors ArchiveModal.js' — this is the JSX rewrite of an older vanilla version. Multiple modal files carry this 'Mirrors X.js' note (HistoryModal, SettingsModal, TaskDetails).

same-two-phase-shutdown-pattern-as.description: Same two-phase shutdown pattern as stop.sh.

scandirectory-builds-a-tree-shaped-node.description: scanDirectory builds a tree-shaped node array with directories first then alphabetical within each level — used for the file-tree display in the project setup modal.

schema-validation-returns-boolean-caller.description: Schema validation returns boolean — callers log/skip on false, never throw.

search-options-stored-globally-in-appcon.description: Search options stored globally in AppContext (state.ideSearchOptions = { regex, caseSensitive, wholeWord, includeGlob, excludeGlob }) — persistent across panel toggles.

section-banner-comments-section-name-for.description: Section banner comments: /* ============ Section Name ============ */ for top-level navigation.

section-component-homesection-accepts-an.description: Section component (HomeSection) accepts an `empty` string used both as the empty-state copy and as the truthy/falsy gate for rendering children.

section-headers-in-comments-runtime-data.description: Section headers in comments (`# Runtime data`, `# Build output`, `# Dependencies`, `# OS`) document the ignore taxonomy.

section-keyed-sections-object-name-text.description: Section-keyed sections object: { [name]: { text, type } } — same shape consumed by both formatBudget and checkBudget.

self-monacoenvironment-global-registrati.description: self.MonacoEnvironment global registration — required hook for Monaco to find its workers.

self-relocating-launcher-pattern-cache-r.description: Self-relocating launcher pattern: cache repo path in a dotfile so the launcher script can be relocated freely.

self-targeting-dogfooding-synapse-uses-s.description: Self-targeting dogfooding: Synapse uses Synapse to build Synapse — proves the architecture works without special-casing.

sendjson-res-statuscode-data-is-the.description: `sendJSON(res, statusCode, data)` is the canonical JSON response helper — sets `Content-Type: application/json` and stringifies the payload.

service-init-via-broadcastfn-injection-c.description: Service init via broadcastFn injection: ClaudeCodeService.init(broadcastFn), CodexService.init(broadcastFn), etc. — services emit progress through this single channel

severity-to-glyph-mapping-is-centralized.description: Severity-to-glyph mapping is centralized via severityToGlyphClass + SEVERITY_MAP for consistency across diagnostics and Problems panel.

severityicon-is-severity-driven-svg-red.description: SeverityIcon is severity-driven SVG: red circle for error, yellow triangle for warning, purple circle for info/hint.

showsuccess-sets-a-transient-success-mes.description: showSuccess sets a transient success message that auto-clears after 3 seconds — distinct from per-dialog error which lives in `error` state.

sidebar-collapse-drives-a-css-custom.description: Sidebar collapse drives a CSS custom property (--sidebar-width) on document.documentElement so unrelated panels can react without prop drilling.

sidebar-view-toggle-via-dispatch-key.description: Sidebar view toggle via dispatch({ key:'ideSidebarView', value:'search'|'explorer' }) — IDEView swaps SearchPanel ↔ FileExplorer based on this.

single-activedialog-state-save-pull-push.description: Single activeDialog state ('save'|'pull'|'push'|'fetch'|'sync'|'moveBranch'|'stash'|'stashPop'|'undoCommit'|'discardAll') controls which ConfirmDialog renders — mutually exclusive.

single-file-json-persistence-no-sqlite.description: Single-file JSON persistence (no SQLite, no electron-store dependency) — keeps Synapse dependency-free for settings

single-in-memory-state-map-activeswarms.description: Single in-memory state map `activeSwarms[dashboardId] = {state, projectPath, provider, model, cliPath, dispatchedTasks, completedTasks, failedTasks, ...}`.

single-source-of-truth-for-archive.description: Single source-of-truth for archive directory layout: ARCHIVE_DIR constant from utils/constants is the only place the path is defined.

single-source-of-truth-pattern-one.description: Single-source-of-truth pattern: one file at a known location, read by every command.

single-source-of-truth-results-query.description: Single source of truth: results, query, options, replaceMode, replaceText, loading all live in AppContext via IDE_SET_SEARCH_* actions.

sort-newest-first-by-updated-iso.description: Sort newest-first by `updated` (ISO string compared via Date.parse).

splitpath-helper-renders-the-basename-pr.description: splitPath() helper renders the basename prominently with the parent directory in a dim suffix — typical IDE file-list pattern.

sse-heartbeat-every-15s-heartbeat-ms.description: SSE heartbeat every 15s (HEARTBEAT_MS) to detect disconnects and prevent proxy timeouts.

stage-progressive-thresholds-more-rigor-.description: Stage-progressive thresholds (more rigor required as the worker advances)

standard-vite-react-entrypoint-empty-bod.description: Standard Vite + React entrypoint: empty body, single mount node, single ES module script.

startup-directory-bootstrapping-dashboar.description: Startup directory bootstrapping (`dashboards/`, `Archive/`, `history/`, `queue/`) is idempotent — all use `fs.existsSync` + `mkdirSync({recursive:true})`.

stashing-pattern-when-the-active-dashboa.description: Stashing pattern: when the active dashboard or tab changes, every relevant ref (activeTaskIdsRef, codexStreamedTaskIdsRef, currentTextIndexRef, toolCallIndexRef) is written to a per-dashboard stash map and re-loaded from the target's stash.

status-aggregation-lane-status-is-derive.description: Status aggregation: lane.status is derived from task statuses (allCompleted -> completed, anyFailed -> failed, anyInProgress -> in_progress, else pending) inside shapeAgent — single source of truth for the row badge.

status-class-map-m-a-d.description: STATUS_CLASS map (M/A/D/R/U/?/T/C) reused independently of ChangesPanel's STATUS_MAP — kept here so DiffViewer is decoupled.

status-color-naming-color-state-for.description: Status color naming: --color-{state} for badges/dots, paired with --color-{state}-bg for tinted backgrounds.

status-dot-tri-state-derived-from.description: Status dot tri-state derived from cross-slice context (currentDashboardId + claudeIsProcessing + claudeProcessingStash + unreadChatCounts).

status-driven-boolean-flags-isidle-isrun.description: Status-driven boolean flags (isIdle/isRunning/isPaused/isStopped) computed at top of render, then per-button can* booleans derived.

status-drives-border-dot-and-bg.description: Status drives border, dot, and bg color via STATUS_COLORS / STATUS_BG_COLORS lookup with 'pending' fallback.

status-mapping-helpers-statusdotclass-st.description: Status mapping helpers statusDotClass / statusLabel are defined once at module scope and reused by IdleItem and DashboardCard.

status-to-label-mapping-inline-in.description: Status-to-label mapping inline in the build loop (`a.status === 'failed' ? 'Agent failed' : 'Agent completed'`).

stderr-scrape-pattern-parse-debugger-lis.description: Stderr-scrape pattern: parse `Debugger listening on (ws://...)` regex from cumulative stderr buffer to find the CDP endpoint.

sticky-bottom-auto-scroll-uses-ref.description: Sticky-bottom auto-scroll uses ref (autoScrollRef) instead of state — avoids re-render cascades during rapid output.

stoppropagation-on-the-close-button-is.description: stopPropagation on the close button is essential because the parent button has its own onClick.

stream-json-ndjson-parsing-each-line.description: stream-json NDJSON parsing: each line is JSON.parse'd inside a try/catch and forwarded as `{chunk, parsed}` so the renderer can use either the raw text or structured event.

streaming-state-lives-entirely-in-refs.description: Streaming state lives entirely in refs; React state updates are dispatched through the context reducer with a functional updater (CLAUDE_UPDATE_MESSAGES + updater fn) to avoid stale closures.

strict-prefix-scoping-git-manager-to.description: Strict prefix scoping (.git-manager-*) to enable safe coexistence with other feature stylesheets.

structural-container-pattern-100-width-h.description: Structural container pattern: 100% width/height flex column, overflow:hidden to clip children.

subject-character-counter-color-flips-to.description: Subject character counter color flips to var(--color-blocked) when subjectLen > 50; body wrap indicator flips when any line exceeds 72.

surface-aware-slice-routing-action-surfa.description: Surface-aware slice routing: action.surface ('code'|'chat') + fieldsFor(surface) + SLICE_FIELDS lookup table — adopt this pattern when adding any chat field.

surgical-text-replacement-distinguish-pu.description: Surgical text replacement: distinguish 'pure-text' content (replace whole inner) from 'mixed' content (segment-walk via non-text regex /<[^>]*>|\{[^}]*\}/ then replace first text segment).

svg-with-separate-visible-polyline-trans.description: SVG with separate visible polyline + transparent hit-area polyline for hover detection — wide hit zone, thin visible line.

sync-async-parallel-pairs-readdashboardi.description: Sync + Async parallel pairs (readDashboardInit / readDashboardInitAsync etc.) — sync used in tight loops (watcher reconciliation, listDashboards) where blocking I/O is acceptable; async used by IPC handler aggregations.

tab-stash-key-pattern-dashboardid-tabid.description: Tab stash key pattern: dashboardId + ':' + tabId — used as both localStorage key suffix and in-memory tabStash key.

tcp-probe-via-net-socket-with.description: TCP probe via net.Socket with timeout=500ms; first success wins.

theme-constants-themes-default-custom-co.description: Theme constants (THEMES, DEFAULT_CUSTOM_COLORS, COLOR_FIELDS, APP_FIELDS) declared at module top — all data-driven so the grid auto-renders.

theme-is-rebuilt-from-css-variables.description: Theme is rebuilt from CSS variables and re-applied on documentElement attribute mutations (data-theme/style) — Synapse theme switches propagate to Monaco automatically.

theme-system-6-named-themes-via.description: Theme system: 6 named themes via [data-theme=name] CSS rules + 1 custom theme via inline style props on documentElement.

theme-tokens-read-from-css-custom.description: Theme tokens read from CSS custom properties via getComputedStyle(documentElement).getPropertyValue — gives JS access to CSS-defined theme without duplication.

three-connection-types-pass-vertical-pas.description: Three connection types: 'pass' (vertical pass-through), 'parent' (down to first parent), 'merge' (curved bezier from secondary parent). Plus 'convergingLines' for freed duplicate lanes at convergence points.

three-function-public-api-estimatetokens.description: Three-function public API: estimateTokens (single text), formatBudget (markdown table for human review), checkBudget (programmatic check).

three-mode-render-gate-hasrepos-gitwelco.description: Three-mode render gate: `!hasRepos` → GitWelcome, `!isGitRepo` → InitFlow, otherwise full layout. Each mode reuses the RepoTabs header.

three-routing-paths-in-worker-output.description: Three routing paths in worker-output: (a) active-dashboard+active-tab → handleChunk/processEvent, (b) active-dashboard+other-tab → routeToTabStash, (c) inactive-dashboard → buffer to dashboard stash slice. Each path duplicates the JSON event parsing.

three-section-collapsible-layout-with-ch.description: Three-section collapsible layout with chevron icons (ChevronIcon) and per-section open state (stagedOpen, unstagedOpen, untrackedOpen).

three-stage-prompt-construction-system-t.description: Three-stage prompt construction (system / task / replan) all using a parts[] array + final parts.join('\n') idiom.

three-state-derivation-pending-in-progre.description: Three-state derivation (pending/in_progress/completed/error) computed live from progress walk rather than stored — queue items have no separate status field, status is always derived.

three-state-ui-idle-initializing-success.description: Three-state UI: idle/initializing/success — driven by initializing and success flags.

three-tier-framework-detection-1-config.description: Three-tier framework detection: (1) config file presence, (2) package.json scripts substring match, (3) framework-prioritized port probe order.

three-tier-project-resolution-pristine-o.description: Three-tier project resolution: pristine override → per-dashboard → global fallback (with chat exception).

three-tier-watch-architecture-per-file.description: Three-tier watch architecture: per-file (fs.watchFile polling for atomic-write resilience) + per-dir (fs.watch for event-based progress) + periodic interval reconciliation (setInterval safety-net).

timing-constants-suffixed-with-ms-millis.description: Timing constants suffixed with `_MS` (milliseconds), `_MS` for poll/debounce/retry distinguishes from raw counts.

title-attribute-on-each-tab-shows.description: Title attribute on each tab shows the full path — useful when names truncate.

tool-calls-render-via-toolcallblock-with.description: Tool calls render via ToolCallBlock with rich per-tool formatters (Read/Edit/Write/Bash/Grep/Glob/Task/WebFetch/WebSearch/TodoWrite/NotebookEdit) — Edit/Write default to expanded, others collapsed.

toolbar-shared-between-empty-state-and.description: Toolbar shared between empty-state and loaded-state via toolbar JSX variable.

trailing-comma-trim-on-accumulator-missi.description: Trailing-comma trim on accumulator MISSING_FIELDS string

treenode-is-recursive-renders-itself-for.description: TreeNode is RECURSIVE — renders itself for each child when expanded.

tri-format-stream-json-parser-direct.description: Tri-format stream-json parser (direct/NDJSON/result) — robust to streaming variants from Claude SDK, Claude CLI, and Codex.

two-channel-push-protocol-terminal-outpu.description: Two-channel push protocol: `terminal-output` (per-chunk data) and `terminal-exit` (one-shot at process exit).

two-column-line-numbers-oldnum-newnum.description: Two-column line numbers (oldNum / newNum) + content with prefix + / − / space — classic GitHub-style unified diff.

two-evaluate-paths-debugger-evaluateonca.description: Two evaluate paths: Debugger.evaluateOnCallFrame (paused state, with frame context) vs Runtime.evaluate (global runtime); same return shape via an inline RemoteObject -> simplified-shape mapper.

two-parallel-maps-built-per-render.description: Two parallel maps built per render: agentMap (id→agent) and per-wave aggregates (completedByWave, totalByWave) for the header badge.

two-pass-instrumentation-1-collect-all.description: Two-pass instrumentation: (1) collect all valid tag matches with their attribute slices, (2) rebuild output string by walking matches and inserting ` data-synapse-label="..."` right before the closing `>`.

two-phase-replan-spawn-cli-parse.description: Two-phase replan: spawn CLI -> parse JSON -> mutate initialization.json on disk -> resume. The CLI runs single-turn (--print, --output-format text, no streaming).

two-phase-shutdown-pattern-discover-all.description: Two-phase shutdown pattern: discover all candidate PIDs first, then act — minimizes race windows where a child respawns mid-script.

two-source-assignment-resolution-with-st.description: Two-source assignment resolution with strict validation regex

two-tier-directory-model-built-in.description: Two-tier directory model: built-in `_commands/<folder>/*.md` (listCommands) vs user-authored `_commands/user/<folder>/*.md` (listUserCommands).

type-assertions-per-field-via-field.description: Type assertions per field via `field | type`

type-discrimination-via-type-field-on.description: Type discrimination via `type` field on each error/warning ('self_ref', 'dangling_ref', 'cycle', 'orphan') — UI uses this to color/group.

type-driven-css-class-via-type.description: Type-driven CSS class via TYPE_CLASS_MAP lookup (stdout, stderr, log, eval-input/result/error, system).

unsubscribe-by-return-every-successful-o.description: Unsubscribe-by-return: every successful 'on' returns an unsubscribe function — idiomatic for React useEffect cleanup

update-state-subscription-via-api-on.description: Update state subscription via api.on('update-status', ...) — live progress percentage during downloads.

url-normalization-heuristic-localhost-ip.description: URL normalization heuristic: localhost/IP -> http://, anything else -> https://.

url-pattern-matching-via-regex-e.description: URL pattern matching via regex (e.g. /^\/api\/dashboards\/([^/]+)\/(.+)$/) — extend by adding a new regex match in routeToIPC.

usememo-for-both-binary-detection-and.description: useMemo for both binary detection and parsing — diff text can be large, recomputing on every render is wasteful.

usememo-over-ideworkspaces-builds-two-pa.description: useMemo over ideWorkspaces builds two parallel structures (Set + Map) to avoid scanning the array twice during sort.

usememo-with-empty-deps-to-capture.description: useMemo with empty deps to capture window globals — same pattern useful for any window.X bridge.

useref-false-useeffect-for-one-shot.description: useRef(false) + useEffect for one-shot migrations (backfilledRef pattern) — ensures async migration runs exactly once across re-renders.

useref-for-listener-unsub-functions-and.description: useRef for listener-unsub functions and accumulated output, useState for reactive UI flags — splits mutable refs from rendered state correctly.

uuid-based-unambiguous-lookup-labels-are.description: UUID-based unambiguous lookup — labels are crypto.randomUUID() so a single matching file is sufficient (no collision handling needed).

validate-then-broadcast-every-payload-ru.description: Validate-then-broadcast: every payload runs through isValidInitialization/isValidLogs/isValidProgress; invalid payloads are logged but not broadcast — prevents corrupt state from reaching SSE/IPC consumers.

validity-gate-pattern-listdashboards-fil.description: Validity-gate pattern: listDashboards() filters by `existsSync(initialization.json)` — used elsewhere as 'this dashboard is real'.

validity-gate-via-initialization-json-ex.description: Validity gate via initialization.json existsSync — same pattern as DashboardService.listDashboards.
